_note: Regenerated 2026-07-04 off the Amber Ascent identity (Step Rail motif, Archivo, navy/amber/paper). Per-image navy-tint overlays are NO LONGER pre-baked: image styling is handled downstream by expression.treatments (house looks) + render-MCP runtime overlay compositing (images.overlay = primary @55%), per ORG-PLAN-045. step-rail-on-{dark,light} are the corner watermark; pattern-full-{navy,paper} are the tiled Step Rail; gradients are palette-derived slide backgrounds.
